Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Path of the Endless Sword]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — The Path of the Endless Sword is followed by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — The Path of the Endless Sword uses resonance to rile up aura in the air using sword madra.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 1''' — The Path of the Endless Sword involves enforcing madra into a weapon to gather aura as it moves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — The Path of the Endless Sword is a choosy Path.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Path of the Endless Sword revolves around vital aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Path of the Endless Sword has no defense.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin has had a recent breakthrough in the Endless Sword technique.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin is no longer on the Path of the Endless Sword.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Path of the Endless Sword focuses on cutting things.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin uses the Path of the Endless Sword cycling technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin has taken many lives on the Path of the Endless Sword.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
